prompt: Adjustment cue: tap left hole card (As).
why_v1: Hole-card anchor keeps hand reference stable before depth action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. As is the hole-card anchor because that blocker changes how credible the pressure line is and how much playability the hand keeps.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Tap the ace of spades because that blocker changes how credible your pressure line is and how much playability the hand keeps at depth.
